data.body:
BRAINSTORM — EPIC REWRITE + MCP SPLIT (user-approved).

Description REWRITTEN from placeholder/provisional charter to the settled FOUNDATION spec (vision fulfilled: editor composes workflows by selecting contract-bearing prompts + scripted ops from a typed palette, and authors prompts in place; every step kind advertises input/output contract + description). Title updated (dropped 'MCP steps', added 'foundation').

MCP track CARVED OUT to follow-on epic: bdac-7cc4-4c10-4425 / pithy-valor-amok ('external MCP-call step kind: allowlist, secrets, manifest'), which depends_on this epic and relates_to e6d9 (workflow-engine-v2). Rationale: separable subsystem, own security surface, env-gated, depends on the contract model but nothing here depends on it.

Both epics pass clarity_check (7/5) + check_ac. Existing story roomy-spine-mirth (editor layout/properties panel) folds into this epic's properties-panel work. NEXT: child-story breakdown under this foundation epic.
